rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description as it is much more accurate than gpt-5-mini's, particularly for the year and specific words, which was visually confirmed. Gpt-5-mini's confidence and specific readings ('Moll?', 'Sale?', '1728') were notably off.

rows.notes: This row was correctly identified by gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini completely missed this distinct sub-header visible in the image.
Selected gemini-flash for the correct description 'Arreragia', which is clearly visible in the image. Gpt-5-mini misread it as 'Arrearages'.

Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Greenear Half a year (in part)' which is more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Gloucester Half a year (bi part)'. Pounds and shillings agree and are correct. However, pence is clearly '0' in the image, overriding gpt-5-mini's '10'.
